name: aastephan/startcrm
description: StartCRM - CRM simple en PHP et CodeIgniter 4

post-create-project-cmd: @php -r "function chmod_r(\$path, \$perm) { foreach(new RecursiveIteratorIterator(new RecursiveDirectoryIterator(\$path, RecursiveDirectoryIterator::SKIP_DOTS), RecursiveIteratorIterator::CHILD_FIRST) as \$item) { chmod(\$item, $perm); } chmod(\$path, $perm); } chmod_r(__DIR__ . '/writable', 0775); echo PHP_EOL . 'StartCRM setup completed.' . PHP_EOL; echo 'If Apache cannot write to writable, run: sudo chown -R www-data:www-data writable' . PHP_EOL;"
